task.title: Initialize the vela-dev Rust workspace
task.objective: Provide a reproducible Rust CLI foundation for Vela development tooling
acceptance_criteria: The pinned Nix shell builds and tests the workspace
The vela-dev CLI exposes stable help output

attempts.summary: Added the workspace, developer CLI, quality recipes, and CI gate

outcome.summary: The repository has a Nix-backed Rust workspace and verified developer CLI

lessons: Pin development tools before adding behavior so local and CI checks share one contract
